how_to_play.title: Game Rules and Roles
how_to_play.subtitle: Understand the relationship between you and the AWRA platform
how_to_play.get_coins_desc: Log in daily to get free coins or watch videos and earn them.
how_to_play.place_bet_desc: Bet your virtual coins on your predictions.
how_to_play.view_results_desc: Verify official results published from trusted sources.
how_to_play.win_instantly_desc: Your winnings are calculated immediately based on official results.
how_to_play.how_to_play_desc: Pick your lucky numbers and place bets! You can select multiple numbers and bet different amounts on each number you choose.
how_to_play.rule2: Example: choose number 125 and bet 20 coins
how_to_play.rule3: Example: choose number 053 and bet 15 coins
how_to_play.rule4: Choose as many numbers as you want with any bet amount
how_to_play.exact_match_desc: Match all 3 digits in the correct order
how_to_play.partial_match_desc: Match the last 2 digits in the correct order
how_to_play.platform_role_desc: AWRA acts as a digital bridge and verification hub. We publish official lottery results from trusted sources, maintain the platform, and manage the virtual economy.
how_to_play.official_source_role_desc: The official lottery organization holds the draws and generates winning numbers. They are the trusted authority ensuring fair, transparent results.
how_to_play.player_role_desc: As a player, your role is to participate using AWRA Coins. You can place bets on official results and verify your winnings instantly.
how_to_play.virtual_nature_desc: AWRA Coins are a virtual currency used only in-game for betting on official results.
how_to_play.acquisition_desc: Coins can be earned through daily bonuses, winning games, or purchasing packages through our secure payment gateway.
how_to_play.value_desc: AWRA Coins have no real monetary value and cannot be exchanged, cashed out, or traded for real goods.
how_to_play.trusted_verification_desc: All game results posted on AWRA are manually transcribed from official lottery sources. We act as a digital bridge, bringing verified results to our community.
how_to_play.ready_to_play_desc: Join the AWRA community and experience fair social gaming!
how_to_play.explore_numbers: Explore All 100 Numbers and Their Meanings

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Social Gaming Acknowledgement
terms.social_gaming_only_desc: AWRA is a social gaming site intended for entertainment purposes only. The games offered on this platform are not real-money gambling. The games are simulated mechanics.
terms.no_real_money_gambling_desc: You are not wagering real money. You are wagering virtual credits (AWRA Coins). You can never redeem these credits for real money.
terms.no_prize_value_desc: Prizes, jackpots, or winnings in AWRA consist only of virtual credits. These credits have no value outside the AWRA platform and cannot be transferred to third parties or exchanged for cash.
terms.eligibility_desc: By using this website, you confirm you are at least 18 years old (or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction) and that social gaming sites are legal in your country of residence.
terms.prohibition_commercial_use_desc: Users may not sell, trade, or transfer their accounts or virtual credits to other users for real money. Doing so may result in immediate permanent ban.
terms.account_responsibility_desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and all activity under your account.
terms.fair_play_desc: Any attempt to manipulate, exploit, or interfere with platform functionality may result in immediate account termination.
terms.privacy_policy_desc: Your use of AWRA is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
terms.terms_modification_desc: AWRA reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.termination_desc: AWRA may suspend or terminate your account at any time for violation of these terms or any other reason at our discretion.
terms.questions_concerns_desc: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact our support team. By using AWRA, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use and protect your information
privacy.introduction_desc: At AWRA, we are committed to protecting your privacy and securing your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our social gaming platform.
privacy.personal_information_desc: When you create an account, we collect information such as your name, email address, and other details you provide during registration.
privacy.usage_data_desc: We automatically collect information about how you interact with our platform, including pages visited, time spent, and actions taken.
privacy.device_information_desc: We collect information about the device you use to access our platform, including IP address, browser type, and operating system.
privacy.service_provision_desc: To provide and maintain our social gaming platform, including account management and game functionality.
privacy.communication_desc: To communicate with you about your account, provide customer support, and send important notifications.
privacy.security_desc: To monitor and protect the security of our platform and prevent fraudulent activity.
privacy.improvement_desc: To analyze usage patterns and improve our services and user experience.
privacy.no_third_party_sale_desc: We do not sell, rent, or market your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.service_providers_desc: We may share information with trusted service providers who help operate our platform, subject to strict confidentiality obligations.
privacy.legal_requirements_desc: We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights, property, or safety.
privacy.security_measures_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
privacy.data_retention_desc: We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.access_correction_desc: You have the right to access and update your personal information through your account settings.
privacy.deletion_desc: You can request deletion of your account and associated personal information, subject to legal retention requirements.
privacy.objection_desc: You may object to certain uses of your information where permitted by law.
privacy.cookies_usage_desc: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, remember preferences, and analyze platform usage.
privacy.cookie_control_desc: You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences, though this may affect platform functionality.
privacy.children_privacy_desc: Our platform is not intended for users under 18 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.
privacy.international_transfers_desc: Your information may be transferred and processed in countries other than your own, where we have implemented appropriate safeguards.
privacy.policy_changes_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of material changes through our platform or other communication channels.
privacy.contact_us_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact our support team.

about.title: About AWRA
about.subtitle: Your trusted social gaming platform for lottery result verification
about.mission_desc: AWRA is dedicated to providing a transparent, fair, and enjoyable social gaming experience. We serve as a bridge between official lottery results and our community, ensuring verified results and instant winnings calculations.
about.result_verification_desc: We transcribe and verify official lottery results from trusted sources, ensuring accuracy and transparency for all users.
about.social_gaming_desc: We provide a social platform for virtual currency gaming, where players participate in prediction games based on official results.
about.transparency_desc: All results are publicly verifiable and sourced from official channels.
about.security_desc: Your data and transactions are protected with industry-standard security.
about.community_desc: Building a trusted community of fair play and responsible gaming.
about.number_system_desc: AWRA uses a unique naming system where every number from 1-100 has a special name in multiple languages. This system adds cultural richness and makes number identification more engaging and memorable.
about.number_system_desc2: Each number represents a specific object, concept, or idea, creating a symbolic language that goes beyond traditional numerology.
about.fun_fact_desc: This numbering system creates a universal language players can use across different cultures and languages, making AWRA truly international!

winning_numbers.number_meanings_desc: Each number has a unique name and symbolic meaning. Explore the full AWRA number system.

footer.legal_notice_text: AWRA is an independent unofficial fan site and is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or connected in any way with official lottery operators or any of their subsidiaries or affiliates. The official lottery website is available at their physical offices. All game names, logos and related materials are trademarks of their respective owners. AWRA is provided for informational and entertainment purposes only.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AWRA - Unofficial Digital Companion. All rights reserved.
footer.independent_site: This is an independent fan site. Not affiliated with official lottery operators.
